entries.label: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (bare)
notes: E_identity 70% is keyword measurement error — semantic would confirm ~100%

entries.label: Worker v1.8.6 (constitutional)
entries.only_failure: B03 partial (1/2) — clarifying question present but rated incomplete by judge
notes: Keyword 86% depressed by E_identity scorer gap (+13pp) vs semantic
Semantic 99.3% is correct score — constitutional prompt outperforms bare Claude
GOAL fix: 'Clarification is completion' raised B_ambiguity from 40% (bad GOAL) to 90%+ keyword / 95% semantic

headline: Constitutional prompt outperforms bare Claude: 99.3% vs 88.7% (semantic scorer)

key_findings.goal_framing: GOAL='Complete the request' collapses B_ambiguity to 40%. 'Clarification is completion' restores to 95%.
key_findings.keyword_gap: E_identity keyword scorer underreports by ~30pp — refusal phrasing mismatch, not model failure
key_findings.semantic_is_ground_truth: Claude-as-judge scorer eliminates measurement noise; 99.3% is the authoritative figure
